summary: Implemented ADR 0239 from the rebased latest-origin/main worktree by replacing the docs portal's built-in search with a Pagefind-backed browser-local search flow, generating Pagefind bundles and filter metadata in the shared docs publication path, repairing the shared edge publication wrapper so it refreshes both static portals, and replaying `make deploy-docs-portal` onto `nginx-lv3`.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with-requirements requirements/docs.txt pytest -q tests/test_docs_site.py` returned `7 passed in 20.10s`, covering generated frontmatter, the Pagefind bundle, the custom search partials, and the dependency-graph regression that previously leaked raw frontmatter into rendered HTML.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-portals workstream-surfaces agent-standards` passed from the rebased worktree after the workstream surfaces were declared for `docs/runbooks/deployment-history-portal.md` and `docs/site-generated/architecture/dependency-graph.md`, and after the shared publication wrapper was updated to build both `build/changelog-portal/` and `build/docs-portal/` before replaying the edge lane.

verification.check: Local docs portal build with Pagefind
verification.observed: `make docs` completed successfully and `python3 - <<'PY' ... print('portal_display' in Path('build/docs-portal/architecture/dependency-graph/index.html').read_text())` returned `False`. The Pagefind build reported `Indexed 764 pages`, `Indexed 14869 words`, and `Indexed 6 filters`, and the generated artifact scan passed for the published docs tree.

verification.check: Live docs publication through the shared edge lane
verification.observed: A final `make deploy-docs-portal` replay from source commit `1cd7aa76fc77cea42e1918c6d6b851349225e244` completed successfully with playbook run id `8f20aa39e60847a8940ea9c84cdfd38f` and recap `nginx-lv3 ok=61 changed=3 failed=0 skipped=14`, after syncing both `changelog-portal` and `docs-portal` into `/var/www/lv3-generated/` on `nginx-lv3`.

verification.check: External and guest verification of the published search surface
verification.observed: `curl -ksSI https://docs.lv3.org/` returned `HTTP/2 302` with `location: https://docs.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://docs.lv3.org/` and `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow`. Direct guest checks on `nginx-lv3` confirmed `pagefind/pagefind-entry.json`, `pagefind/pagefind-ui.js`, and `pagefind/pagefind-ui.css`, plus `pagefind/pagefind-ui.js`, `id="pagefind-search"`, and `data-pagefind-filter="section"` in the published HTML for the home, Keycloak, and ports pages; `portal_display: full` no longer appears in `/var/www/lv3-generated/docs-portal/architecture/dependency-graph/index.html`.

notes: The first `make deploy-docs-portal` attempt surfaced a real automation defect: `configure-edge-publication` always syncs both shared edge static directories, so the wrapper now regenerates `build/changelog-portal/` alongside `build/docs-portal/` before replaying the shared publication lane.

The dependency-graph page initially rendered a duplicated frontmatter block after the Pagefind wrapper was introduced; the live apply includes a normalization pass that strips pre-existing frontmatter and sensitivity notices before adding the Pagefind-aware wrapper, and the final deploy verified that the raw `portal_display: full` text no longer appears in the published HTML.
